testsuite.name: io.slogr.agent.platform.registration.RegistrationTest

testcase.name: interactive registration stores credential with API_KEY method()
bootstrap registration fails on non-2xx response()
parseCredential without gcp key leaves field null()

testsuite.system-out: 09:46:14.989 [Test worker] DEBUG io.mockk.impl.instantiation.AbstractMockFactory -- Creating mockk for CredentialStore name=#113 09:46:15.012 [Test worker] DEBUG io.mockk.impl.instantiation.AbstractMockFactory -- Creating mockk for CredentialStore name=#114 09:46:15.074 [Test worker] DEBUG io.mockk.impl.instantiation.AbstractMockFactory -- Creating mockk for Unit name=child of #114#115 09:46:15.082 [Test worker @coroutine#323] INFO io.slogr.agent.platform.registration.BootstrapRegistrar -- Bootstrap registration starting... 09:46:17.383 [Test worker @coroutine#323] DEBUG io.mockk.impl.recording.states.AnsweringState -- Answering kotlin.Unit on CredentialStore(#114).store(AgentCredential(agentId=ede1badc-fe4e-40ce-b75d-32b7032cdabc, tenantId=f4bee3e7-a778-4904-b803-eeeb6368f93e, displayName=test-agent, jwt=eyJ.test.jwt, rabbitmqJwt=eyJ.rmq.jwt, rabbitmqHost=mq.slogr.io, rabbitmqPort=5671, pubsubSubscription=slogr.agent-commands.ede1badc-fe4e-40ce-b75d-32b7032cdabc, issuedAt=2026-04-01T04:46:17.381075400Z, connectedVia=BOOTSTRAP_TOKEN, gcpServiceAccountKey=null)) 09:46:17.383 [Test worker @coroutine#323] INFO io.slogr.agent.platform.registration.BootstrapRegistrar -- Bootstrap registration complete.
